report.summary: CONVERGENCE DAY: BTC crashed to ~$66,587 (-5.5% since Mar 25). $14.16B options expired at 08:00 UTC (max pain $75K). SEC rules on 91 crypto ETFs today. ETF outflows -$171M Mar 26. F&G 13-29 (Fear/Extreme Fear). Disk FIXED (94G free). 146 uncommitted files ready to deploy. 2-day agent gap (no runs Mar 26-27).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET CRASH: BTC ~$66,587 (down from $70,525-$71,300 on Mar 25 — a 5.5% drop). Breached $68K support. Geopolitical risk (US-Israel-Iran escalation) + options expiry pressure driving selloff.
ETH: ~$2,027-$2,118 (down from $2,166-$2,327 on Mar 25 — ~7-8% drop). Whale selling detected. RSI 48, MACD negative. Consolidation range $1,980-$2,080.
F&G INDEX: Conflicting readings — 13 (Extreme Fear per SpotedCrypto) to 29 (Fear per CoinMarketCap). Likely in 13-20 range given BTC below $68K. Extended streak of fear readings now 48+ days.
ETF FLOWS: -$171.3M net outflows Mar 26 (IBIT -$41.9M, FBTC -$32.8M, BITB -$33.1M). March total inflows dropped 73% to $890M from Feb's $3.3B. Institutional repositioning ahead of convergence.

OPTIONS EXPIRY — TODAY: $14.16B settled at 08:00 UTC on Deribit. Max pain $75K (BTC currently $9K below max pain). Put/call 0.85. Largest quarterly expiry of 2026. Post-settlement volatility expected.

SEC ETF RULING — TODAY: Hard deadline for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens. XRP at $1.44B pre-approval inflows. 16 cryptos already classified as digital commodities (Mar 17 joint SEC-CFTC ruling). Solana ETFs drew $111.1M weekly inflows.
DELTA FROM MAR 25 v23: BTC -5.5%, ETH -7-8%. ETF flows reversed (inflows → outflows). Disk full RESOLVED. 2-day agent gap. Both convergence events are NOW happening, not 12 hours away.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 2-DAY GAP: No agent runs between Mar 25 v23 and now. Likely caused by disk full blocking operations (resolved) or session expiry.
BLOCKER RESOLVED: Disk space FIXED — 94G available (was 0). All bash/git/build operations now functional.
BLOCKER ACTIVE [P0]: 146 uncommitted files in working tree on main branch. Includes 5 OG SVGs, 8 report JSONs, globals.css, 6+ learn page.tsx files. Need mass commit + push + deploy.
BLOCKER ACTIVE [P1]: git index.lock status — last checked Mar 25. Need to verify before committing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 4 ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Ondo) missing metadata exports.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter on 0/6 core API routes. Traffic spike from convergence day could hammer CoinGecko free tier.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 154+ TS errors, ~103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx, ~120 learn pages missing OG images.
PUBLISH QUEUE: Remains EMPTY — all ~540+ slugs promoted. No new content queued since Mar 25.
CUMULATIVE THROUGH MAR 25: ~44 pages promoted, 38+ learn guides, 30+ OG images, 170+ social posts, 36+ SVG cards, 55+ UX fixes across 105 agent cycles.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — EMERGENCY DEPLOY: Convergence day is HERE. Commit 146 files → push → Vercel auto-deploy. This is the #1 action. Fix git index.lock if needed, then mass commit. Every hour without deploying is missed search traffic from options expiry + SEC ruling searches.

PRIORITY 2 — CONVERGENCE CONTENT CAPTURE: BTC crashed 5.5% — this IS the post-expiry volatility event. Write/publish reactive content: '$14B Options Expiry: BTC Drops Below $68K', 'SEC Rules on 91 Crypto ETFs: Full Breakdown', 'XRP ETF Approved? What $1.44B in Inflows Means'. These are high-intent searches happening RIGHT NOW.

PRIORITY 3 — RATE LIMITER BEFORE TRAFFIC SPIKE: If SEC approves multiple ETFs, traffic could 3-5x today. CoinGecko free tier with 0/6 routes protected = guaranteed 429s. At minimum, add rate limiting to the top 3 API routes (price, market, trending).

STRATEGIC CONTEXT: This is the single most important day for degen0x since launch. $14.16B options just expired, SEC ruling imminent, BTC in freefall, fear at multi-year extremes. Our 540+ pages are positioned for every search vector — but 146 files need deploying. The window for reactive content on convergence events is 4-8 hours. Speed is everything today.

report.email: SKIPPED — Resend API blocked by proxy allowlist (403). Chrome JS also failed (CORS). Manual send needed.
